## How to Use This Chart

Every seat has **one owner** and **five roles**.

## Visionary

| # | Role |
|---|------|
| 1 | Big relationships |
| 2 | Culture |
| 3 | Big ideas |
| 4 | Problem solving |
| 5 | Selling |
